Robert Wiesner

Platform Engineer — Technical Leadership, Developer Infrastructure, AI-Assisted Engineering

What I Do

  • Build platform and infrastructure at global scale — observability, resilience, cost efficiency, scalability
  • Empower developers through automation, clear interfaces, and shared standards
  • Drive alignment between product goals and engineering execution
  • Provide technical leadership across teams and systems

Tech I Work With

   
Backend Kotlin, Ktor, Spring Boot, Gradle
Frontend TypeScript, React
Infrastructure Terraform, AWS (ECS, Lambda, RDS, CloudFront, S3), Atlantis
Data Kafka, Avro, ClickHouse, DynamoDB
CI/CD GitHub Actions, Renovate, Docker, ArgoCD
APIs OpenAPI, REST, GraphQL

Currently Exploring

Integrating AI-assisted engineering into production-grade workflows:

  • AI coding agents for cross-repo changes and API evolution
  • Deterministic AI-assisted delivery loops (design → implement → test → review → deploy)
  • AI integration into CI/CD pipelines and platform tooling
  • Guardrails for architectural consistency and reviewable AI-generated changes

By the Numbers (Apr 2024 – Mar 2026)

   
PRs Authored 1,576 (85% merge rate)
PRs Reviewed 2,163
Repositories 40+
Languages Added 4 (DE, NO, FR, DA)
Framework Migrations Led 3
AI Adoption 62% of commits AI-assisted within 5 weeks

How to Work With Me

I value integrity, reliability, curiosity, and consistency. I prefer direct communication, written discussions, and pragmatic decision-making.
